title: Character Counter
shortDescription: Count characters in text instantly with fast results, simple inputs and practical examples.
overview: Count characters in text instantly. Use this tool to get a clear result quickly from simple input on the same page. It is useful for everyday checks, comparisons and small tasks when you need a fast online answer.

Review the result and continue with related tools if you need another step.
